KOMEIJIKOISHI-ULTIMATE_UNCONSCIOUS_FORM_: When you manually play a card, automatically play {Amount} Unconscious cards from your hand. Whenever you play an Unconscious card, draw 1 card.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM_STANCE_POWER.title: Bloom
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM_STANCE_POWER.smartDe: When you play an Attack, deal extra damage equal to that card's damage to a random enemy. [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is reduced by {BlockReduction}%. When entering this stance, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}. Only Koishi Komeiji can fully master this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM_STANCE_POWER.descrip: When you play an Attack, deal extra damage equal to that card's damage to a random enemy. [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is reduced by 70%. When entering this stance, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Only Koishi Komeiji can fully master this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED_STANCE_POWER.title: Closed
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED_STANCE_POWER.smartD: [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is increased by {BlockBonus}%. Draw 1 card when entering this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED_STANCE_POWER.descri: [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is increased by 20%. Draw 1 card when entering this stance.
